mapper.select:
SELECT C.fk_memberid AS memberId, C.company_name AS companyName, C.biz_no AS bizNo, C.industry_code AS industryCode, C.ceo_name AS ceoName, C.zip_code AS zipCode, C.addr1 AS addr1, C.addr2 AS addr2,
CI.intro_text AS introText, CI.welfare_text AS welfareText, TO_CHAR(CI.open_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openDate, TO_CHAR(CI.open_date, 'YYYY') AS foundedYear, CI.homepage_url AS homepageUrl, CI.vision_text AS visionText, CI.company_type AS companyType,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_company_follow CF WHERE CF.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid ) AS followerCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP WHERE JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ) AS activePostCount,
(SELECT I.file_url FROM tbl_image_file I WHERE I.target_type = 'company' AND I.filecategory = 'logo' AND I.target_id = CI.company_intro_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS logoUrl,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP2 WHERE JP2.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid ) AS totalPostCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_company_follow CF2 WHERE CF2.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid AND CF2.fk_memberid = #{loginMemberId} ) AS isFollowed
0 AS isFollowed
FROM tbl_company C LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid WHERE C.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND C.approved_yn = 1

SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.title AS title, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, JP.salary AS salary, JP.view_count AS viewCount, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt,
CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' ELSE 'D-' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay,
R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName,
EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName,
(SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id ) AS skillNames,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application JA WHERE JA.fk_job_id = JP.job_id ) AS applyCount
FROM tbl_job_posting JP LEFT JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON JP.fk_edu_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE JP.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY JP.created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.fk_memberid AS memberId, C.company_name AS companyName, C.industry_code AS industryCode, CI.company_type AS companyType,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP WHERE JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ) AS activePostCount
FROM tbl_company C LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_member M ON C.fk_memberid = M.memberid WHERE C.industry_code = #{industryCode} AND C.fk_memberid != #{memberId} AND C.approved_yn = 1 AND M.status = 1 ORDER BY activePostCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_company_follow (fk_company_memberid, fk_memberid, followed_at) VALUES (#{companyMemberId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rno, T.* FROM ( SELECT C.fk_memberid AS memberId, C.company_name AS companyName, C.industry_code AS industryCode, C.ceo_name AS ceoName, C.addr1 AS addr1, C.addr2 AS addr2, CI.company_type AS companyType, CI.homepage_url AS homepageUrl, TO_CHAR(CI.open_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS openDate,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_company_follow CF WHERE CF.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid ) AS followerCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP WHERE JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ) AS activePostCount,
(SELECT I.file_url FROM tbl_image_file I WHERE I.target_type = 'company' AND I.filecategory = 'logo' AND I.target_id = CI.company_intro_id AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS logoUrl
FROM tbl_company_follow F JOIN tbl_company C ON F.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_member M ON C.fk_memberid = M.memberid WHERE F.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND M.status = 1 AND C.approved_yn = 1
AND ( UPPER(C.company_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(DECODE(C.industry_code, 'IT', 'IT·인터넷', 'SW', '소프트웨어', 'FIN', '금융·핀테크', 'EDU', '교육·에듀테크', 'MKT', '마케팅', 'ETC', '기타', C.industry_code)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY F.followed_at DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rno >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_company_follow F JOIN tbl_company C ON F.fk_company_memberid = C.fk_memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro CI ON C.fk_memberid = CI.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_member M ON C.fk_memberid = M.memberid WHERE F.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND M.status = 1 AND C.approved_yn = 1
AND ( UPPER(C.company_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(DECODE(C.industry_code, 'IT', 'IT·인터넷', 'SW', '소프트웨어', 'FIN', '금융·핀테크', 'EDU', '교육·에듀테크', 'MKT', '마케팅', 'ETC', '기타', C.industry_code)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T.* FROM ( SELECT JP.job_id AS jobId, JP.title AS title, JP.work_type AS workType, JP.career_type AS careerType, JP.salary AS salary, JP.view_count AS viewCount, JP.deadline_type AS deadlineType, TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS deadlineAt,
CASE WHEN JP.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' ELSE 'D-' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(JP.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS dDay,
R.region_name AS regionName, PR.region_name AS parentRegionName,
EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName,
(SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_job_posting_skill JPS JOIN tbl_skill S ON JPS.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE JPS.fk_job_id = JP.job_id ) AS skillNames,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application JA WHERE JA.fk_job_id = JP.job_id ) AS applyCount
FROM tbl_job_posting JP LEFT JOIN tbl_region R ON JP.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_region PR ON R.fk_parent_region_code = PR.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON JP.fk_edu_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE JP.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) ORDER BY JP.created_at DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_posting JP WHERE JP.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND JP.status = '게시중' AND JP.is_hidden = 0 AND (JP.deadline_type = 'always' OR JP.deadline_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE))
